title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Key Exchange

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: Someone humming and wrapped in darkness appeared.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: A swords- man with a frightening face...

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Is looking for his own shadow !!!

dialogue.speaker: Perona
dialogue.text: Shut up and don't wake me, kumashi.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: What is that power...? Isn't this zombie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Is nothing but comical to me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: for this chance to come once again!!!
